name: Jungle Bird
description: A tropical, bittersweet rum cocktail made with BACARDÍ Carta Negra, pineapple, lime, and simple syrup. A bracing way to start the evening, with no rough edges thanks to the pineapple and lime that give this classic a tropical vibe.
recipe_steps: Build: Place all of the ingredients into a shaker and add ice.
Strain into an old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a pineapple leaf.
searchable_text: Jungle Bird main rum BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum A tropical, bittersweet rum cocktail made with BACARDÍ Carta Negra, pineapple, lime, and simple syrup. A bracing way to start the evening, with no rough edges thanks to the pineapple and lime that give this classic a tropical vibe. ingredients 37.5 ml BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum, 12.5 ml MARTINI Bitter vermouth, 37.5 ml pineapple juice, 18.75 ml lime juice, 18.75 ml simple syrup recipe steps Build: Place all of the ingredients into a shaker and add ice. Shake vigorously. Strain into an old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice. Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a pineapple leaf.
